c.d: The range of operating systems and devices on which the app is available.
c.s: Official app websites, App Store listings

c.d: The variety and depth of functionalities offered by the app, such as multimedia support, collaboration tools, and integration capabilities.
The design, ease of use, and overall user experience provided by the app.
The cost structure of the app, including free tiers, subscription plans, and one-time purchases.
c.s: Official app websites, App Store listings

c.d: The measures taken by the app to protect user data, including encryption and privacy policies.
The app's ability to sync notes across devices and provide backup options.
The capability of the app to function without an internet connection.
The extent to which the app allows customization and supports plugins or extensions.
Tools and functionalities that enable multiple users to work together on notes.
The app's speed, responsiveness, and stability during use.
